Now I have a clear view of atom 7 (C) and all its covalently bonded neighbours. From the zoomed and rotated views, I can identify the following:

## Results for Atom 7 (C)

**Neighbour atoms of atom 7 (C):**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|:---:|:---:|
| 6 | C |
| 8 | C |
| 14 | O |

**Explanation:**
- **C:6** — bonded to atom 7 as part of the aromatic ring
- **C:8** — bonded to atom 7 as part of the aromatic/fused ring system
- **O:14** — bonded to atom 7, connecting to the side chain (leading to C:15)

Atom 7 (C) has **3 covalent neighbours**, consistent with an sp² carbon in an aromatic ring bearing an oxygen substituent.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 7, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
